candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net sales and is the clearest total revenue row.

candidates.why: Not revenue; amortization component within cost of revenues.

candidates.row_label: Loss on sales of operations and shares
candidates.why: Non-operating gain/loss, not revenue.
Profit measure, not revenue.
Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid interest expenses and accrued interest income
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued interest expenses and prepaid interest income
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability/asset accrual row, not revenue.

candidates.why: Exact direct cost row for cost of sales/COGS.
Also an exact COGS row; appears duplicate of the same concept.
Finance/hedging item, not COGS.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.

candidates.why: Balancing row explicitly excluded in favor of reported component row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Amortization subcomponent, not full COGS.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above operating income.
Clear SG&A overhead component above operating income.

Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A expense.
Headcount statistic, not SG&A expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the two operating overhead components above operating income. Excluded Other operating income/expenses because it mixes income and expense; excluded supplemental R&D because it appears below EBIT.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense label; best available match even though shown in supplemental section below EBIT.
Balance sheet asset line, not R&D expense.

Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D expense row. It appears below operating income in the supplemental area, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad total includes FX and other non-interest items, so less preferred than granular recurring finance cost components.
Core recurring interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease interest component; appropriate to include.
Potentially recurring finance cost component; acceptable when used with granular finance-cost mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Duplicate of lease interest component in supplemental section; avoid double counting.

Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost rows over total Financial expenses, which includes FX and other non-interest items. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid duplication.

candidates.why: Owner/parent equity line; preferred over Total Equity to avoid double counting any non-controlling interests.
Total equity line, but less preferred if a parent/owner equity line exists.
Shareholder count, not equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Used the parent-equity line as first priority because BE should exclude NCI. Included Total Equity as fallback priority because labels may vary over time and no separate NCI line is present in the provided balance sheet.
No minority interest/non-controlling interests line is present on the provided balance sheet.
